title: cleistopholis patens
intro: Cleistopholis patens, also known as African starfruit, is a type of plant native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Annonaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Cleistopholis patens has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
